basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Research Scientist, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Contractual Positions under NDUS-2025 Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiimsbhopal.edu.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Bhopal Contractual Positions under NDUS-2025 Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC candidates in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/BVSc/BDS with experience or PG or PhD, Three Years Graduate degree + experience or PG, 10th + Diploma + experience or Graduate + experience
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist II-(Medical): MBBS/ BVSc/ BDS with three years post qualification experience or MBBS/ BVSc/ BDS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MVSc./MDS/MPH) or any equivalent degree or MBBS/BVSc/BDS with PhD Project Technical Support-III: Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject/ field + three years post qualification experience or PG in relevant subject/ field or Four Years Graduate Degree for Engineering/ IT/ CS Project Technical Support/Assistant/Accountant-I: 10th + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT/ ITI or equivalent) + two years experience in relevant subject/ field or Three years Graduate degree in relevant subject/ field + one year experience in relevant subject

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 80,000/-, Rs. 28,000/-, Rs. 18,000/- + HRA as applicable

selection_process: Interview or Written test as applicable Interview/Skill Test/Written test as applicable

_labels.notification_pdf: Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Bhopal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist II-(Medical): MBBS/ BVSc/ BDS with three years post qualification experience or MBBS/ BVSc/ BDS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MVSc./MDS/MPH) or any equivalent degree or MBBS/BVSc/BDS with PhD Project Technical Support-III: Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject/ field + three years post qualification experience or PG in relevant subject/ field or Four Years Graduate Degree for Engineering/ IT/ CS Project Technical Support/Assistant/Accountant-I: 10th + Diploma (MLT/ DMLT/ ITI or equivalent) + two years experience in relevant subject/ field or Three years Graduate degree in relevant subject/ field + one year experience in relevant subject

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC candidates in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government from time to time.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Interview or Written test as applicable Interview/Skill Test/Written test as applicable

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the contractual positions at AIIMS Bhopal is scheduled for 26 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all required documents for the interview process.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in this AIIMS Bhopal recruitment?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bhopal is recruiting for three contractual positions: Project Research Scientist II-(Medical), Project Technical Support-III, and Project Technical Support/Assistant/Accountant-I under the NDUS-2025 initiative.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Research Scientist II-(Medical)?
faq.answer: For the Project Research Scientist II-(Medical) post, candidates need an MBBS/ BVSc/ BDS with three years of post-qualification experience, or a Post Graduate Degree (MD/MVSc./MDS/MPH), or a PhD.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for these positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these contractual positions at AIIMS Bhopal. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Project Technical Support-III?
faq.answer: The Project Technical Support-III position offers a salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as applicable. This is a contractual role under the NDUS-2025 project.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal. The exact venue details and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The specific age limits for each post are not detailed here, but age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Central Government instructions. Please refer to the official notification for precise age criteria.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are there in total?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for these contractual positions under the NDUS-2025 project at AIIMS Bhopal.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the duration of the NDUS-2025 project.

faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the contractual positions at AIIMS Bhopal is scheduled for 26 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all required documents for the interview process.
